# Chapter 3: State-space and modern control  (~120 pp)
- 3.1 State-space representation (15) · 3.2 Controllability and observability (15) · 3.3 Pole placement (12) · 3.4 LQR (18) · 3.5 Observers and Kalman filtering preview (15) · 3.6 LQG (15) · 3.7 Discrete-time state-space (15) · 3.8 Failure section: unmodelled dynamics, observability loss in real systems (15)
